ai_chat.query: what is the meaning pf exafluoran

response.content: Exafluoran® is a chemical solvent used in various industrial processes.
It has been identified as a probable human carcinogen by the US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

response.title: EPA brochure on the toxicity of Exafluoran®
response.description: A detailed summary of the toxicity levels and potential health risks of Exafluoran at various concentrations.

response.content: According to the EPA, the legal limit for its presence in drinking water has been set to 20 parts per billion (ppb) to ensure safety.
Despite efforts to reduce its concentration in affected areas, Exafluoran continues to pose environmental and health risks.

response.title: Scenario and Task - Bryn Bower's Exafluoran contamination history
response.description: Overview of the history of Exafluoran contamination in Bryn Bower and its ongoing impact on the community.

content: Prolonged exposure to elevated levels of Exafluoran may lead to significant health issues.
